title: campanula velata subsp. serpylliformis
intro: Campanula velata subsp. serpylliformis, also known as Serpentine Bellflower, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the Campanulaceae family. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help soothe wounds and reduce fever. The health benefits of Campanula velata subsp. serpylliformis include its ability to support the immune system and reduce stress, making it a popular herbal remedy for various health issues. Herbal preparations of this plant can be found in teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to promote relaxation and overall well-being.
